name: daily-fresh fetch: --emit-status writes JSON {fresh-within-fetch-frequency | stale-warn-degraded | offline-cached | operator-bypass} for §2.8 freshness_at_generation field
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id x --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z --emit-status "$PWD/status.json" && grep "fresh-within-fetch-frequency" status.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
